title: MC:Xbox 360 by Raphaelakos
description: This modpack is a version like Xbox 360 but for PC! You can play normally as you would on Xbox 360 on PC. It also works with a controller.
body:
This modpack is a version like Xbox 360 but for PC! You can play normally as you would on Xbox 360 on PC. It also works with a controller.


This modpack recreates the Xbox 360 Minecraft experience on PC!
Play just like on Xbox 360, with full controller support for smooth gameplay.
Perfect for players who love the console feel but want to play on their computer.


[Photos for minecraft xbox like](https://discord.gg/wFjRKeMh)
